turns.speaker: Maria
turns.text: I'm so excited, I think I'm getting the promotion today, I can feel it!

turns.speaker: Boss
turns.text: Maria, I'm sorry, but the role's been put on hold due to budget cuts.

turns.speaker: Maria
turns.text: Oh. I... I really thought this was it. That's a tough hit.

turns.speaker: Maria
turns.text: I guess I'll just go back to my desk. Hard to feel anything but flat right now.
